title: abutilon mitchellii
intro: Abutilon mitchellii, also known as the orange flowered flowering maple, is a flowering plant native to the western coast of North America. This plant is known for its bright orange flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The roots and leaves of Abutilon mitchellii contain medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems. Abutilon mitchellii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
